title: Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework
use_when: Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework. Use when the user needs a product workflow for presentation & communication related to presentations from 5-step storytelling framework. Trigger terms: presentations, storytelling, product-management, communication.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $presentations-from-5-step-storytelling-framework to turn this presentations context into a decision-ready Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Presentations from 5-step storytelling framework stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
